positive: Synthwave aesthetic illustration of a neon-lit cityscape at sunset. Features a stylized grid pattern receding into the distance, glowing palm trees, and a chrome sports car. Vibrant gradient colors (magenta, cyan, electric blue). Vaporwave style, vaporwave, 80s retro futurism, synthwave album cover art.
